summary: Implemented 5 conservative inference rules in src/modules/shadow-profile/inference-rules.ts: (1) Desktop usage pattern — checks hardwareConcurrency >= 4, no touch, screenWidth >= 1280; (2) Geographic region from timezone — maps known timezones to broad regions; (3) Privacy-conscious user — requires 2+ signals from doNotTrack and denied permissions; (4) High-end hardware — checks hardwareConcurrency >= 8, devicePixelRatio >= 2, and high-end GPU keywords; (5) Multilingual user — checks 2+ browser languages. All rules are pure functions returning InferenceStatement | null, use createInference() for validation, and avoid certainty language. Updated index.ts to re-export all rule functions and applyInferenceRules. All 47 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
